personal.preferred_title: Senior Observability & Performance Engineer | APM | Cloud Infrastructure
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Observability and Performance Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience designing and operating APM platforms, monitoring pipelines, and performance analytics in regulated financial environments. Expert in Dynatrace, AppDynamics, CA APM (Introscope), and BMC TrueSight — managing 6,000+ monitored endpoints and 50+ Enterprise Managers. Proven track record building automated telemetry pipelines, dashboards, and alerting systems in Python and scripting languages. 8+ years supporting banking infrastructure at Citi with compliance and security disciplines aligned to financial services standards. Local to Carrollton, TX.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Managed dual APM environments (CA Wily/Introscope, AppDynamics) and BMC TrueSight across 6,000+ endpoints, configuring thresholds, alerts, and baselines for enterprise banking infrastructure.
Architected automated Python/Pandas telemetry pipelines ingesting P95 performance metrics from 6,000+ servers, replacing manual monitoring processes.
Built interactive performance dashboards (matplotlib, seaborn, plotly) delivering real-time visibility into infrastructure health and capacity risk to leadership.
Developed predictive ML models (Prophet, scikit-learn) identifying performance bottlenecks 3-6 months ahead, enabling proactive capacity planning.
Conducted data mining across integrated monitoring feeds (TrueSight, CA APM, AppDynamics) to surface underutilized infrastructure and drive cost optimization.
Operated within banking compliance and regulated environment standards throughout 8-year tenure.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetics for Brand.com and revenue-critical systems, providing end-to-end monitoring and EUM visibility.
Led 'FAST' initiative: data-mined real-user performance metrics to identify and quantify optimization opportunities for money-generating systems.
Upgraded Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0, implemented TLS 1.2 security hardening, and supported AWS cloud migration performance validation.
Integrated Performance Center with Dynatrace; delivered before/after performance dashboards for stakeholder reporting.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Managed and supported enterprise CA APM, CA CEM, and CA ADA environments for utility infrastructure monitoring.

experience.title: Senior Consultant — CA APM SME
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for TIAA-CREF, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 monitored agents across large-scale financial systems.
Led APM implementations and major upgrades (v9.1 through v10.1) for enterprise financial clients, ensuring platform stability and coverage.
Designed custom Management Modules, dashboards, and alerting policies; authored Perl/Ksh data-extraction scripts to extend platform capabilities.
Delivered client training programs, sizing recommendations, and Golden Image agent rollouts; served as technical SME enabling partner teams.
Collaborated with IT teams to troubleshoot performance bottlenecks in J2EE/WebLogic environments, reducing MTTR.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications to identify optimal load points and resource bottlenecks (JDBC, threads, memory, CPU, GC).
Installed JMX monitoring, Thread Dump analysis, and Wily Introscope instrumentation; built automation scripts for performance test execution.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Optimized core C++/OCCI transaction processing for high-throughput shopping engine, reducing physical hardware footprint 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Led migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to 6-node Oracle RAC cluster; built CPPUNIT testing framework for automated validation.

experience.title: Developer / Performance Engineer
bullets: Delivered C/C++ performance tuning in billing systems: 75% memory reduction, 20% throughput gain, 10x DB performance via query optimization.
Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, and socket programming.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built end-to-end agentic job application pipeline orchestrating 10+ automated steps using Python, Claude Code, FAISS vector embeddings, and LLM APIs.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Replaced manual forecasting with AI-driven engine; reduced forecasting cycles by 90%. Built Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead with real-time Streamlit dashboards.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed full serverless data platform (S3 + Glue + Athena + Bedrock) with Text-to-SQL GenAI agent using Claude 3 Sonnet.
